author: Lee Page
content:
We have worked with Joanne & Dave @ Monsters Event Hire for a number of years and would never use anyone else. They are always available to ask for advice on the latest regulations & Health & Safety  guidance with the use of inflatables. I always have my annual testing & repairs conducted by them and any advice on new inflatables I would always go to them. Joanne & Dave will always tell you exactly what is required & never "sugar coat" any recommendations that are needed. Very professional, approachable & friendly.
Highly recommended!
